negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_223
prompt: A serene park setting with lush green grass and trees with green leaves serves as the backdrop for this video. Two women stand amidst the tranquil environment, engaged in a casual conversation. The woman on the left, with long brown hair and a beige coat, holds a white disposable cup in her right hand and a piece of food in her left. The woman on the right, adorned with a black hat and a black and white checkered coat, enjoys a sip from her cup, tilting her head back slightly with each drink. She continues to hold the cup in her right hand while conversing, occasionally lowering it to take another sip. The woman on the left remains mostly stationary, gesturing with her left hand as they talk. The background remains consistent, showcasing rolling green hills, scattered trees, and a clear sky. The video captures the essence of a relaxed and pleasant interaction between the two women in a picturesque park setting.
